summary: Phase 1 Step 1.5 Role-Based Routing - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 12/12 pytest tests passed. Frontend: All 9 feature tests passed via Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: App.js: getHomeRoute() correctly routes director/coach → /mission-control, athlete/parent → /board
ProtectedRoute: allowedRoles prop with role-based redirect via getHomeRoute() works correctly
Sidebar.js: getNavItems(role) returns correct nav arrays - STAFF_NAV + DIRECTOR_EXTRA for director, STAFF_NAV for coach, ATHLETE_NAV for athlete/parent
LoginPage.js: Role selector with Athlete/Parent/Coach buttons, default role is athlete
auth.py: SELF_REGISTER_ROLES = {coach, athlete, parent} - director cannot self-register (403)
Athlete claim flow: _try_claim_athlete() attempts to link new user to existing athlete record by email match
seed_data_creation: Created aria.brooks@example.com athlete user during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Role-based routing Step 1.5 fully verified. Key verified features: (1) Director login → /mission-control with sidebar: Dashboard, Events, Advocacy, Program, Roster, AI Features. (2) Coach login → /mission-control with sidebar: Dashboard, Events, Advocacy, Program, AI Features (NO Roster). (3) Registration form role selector shows Athlete, Parent, Coach buttons. Director role cannot be self-registered (403). (4) Athlete registration → /board with sidebar: Dashboard, Pipeline, Schools, Calendar, Inbox, Profile, Analytics, Settings. AI Features NOT visible for athletes. (5) Athlete route guard: /mission-control redirects to /board. (6) Director route guard: /board redirects to /mission-control. (7) AthleteComingSoonPage shows 'Coming in Phase 2' with dynamic title based on route. (8) Role badge at sidebar bottom shows correct role and user name.

director_login_redirect.details: Director redirected to /mission-control with full staff sidebar + Roster

coach_login_redirect.details: Coach redirected to /mission-control, sidebar has staff nav but NO Roster

registration_role_selector.details: Create Account tab shows role selector with Athlete, Parent, Coach buttons

athlete_registration_redirect.details: Athlete registration → /board with athlete-specific sidebar (8 items)

ai_features_visibility.details: AI Features visible for staff (director/coach), hidden for athletes

role_badge_display.details: Sidebar shows role badge (DIRECTOR/COACH/ATHLETE) with user name

athlete_coming_soon_page.details: /board and athlete routes show 'Coming in Phase 2' message with correct page titles

aria_brooks_claim.details: aria.brooks@example.com registered as athlete, redirected to /board

logout.details: Clearing localStorage and redirecting to /login works correctly
